title: Origins-Fantasy
description: An Origins Reborn origin addon for PaperMC servers, adding 10 new origins with a fantasy theme
body:
# Origins-Fantasy  
Origins-Fantasy is an [Origins Reborn](https://modrinth.com/plugin/origins-reborn) addon which adds 10 fantasy-themed origins.

Add this to the server plugins folder with Origins-Reborn and restart the server to begin playing with the new origins!

For support join the [Starshooter](https://discord.gg/dQGaXgxMpg) discord server.

## Server Hosting (Advertisement)
[![Create a server on Bisect](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/84c367e7ba28598bc811ff7d632c22ebed744ff3.png)](https://www.bisecthosting.com/comet)

## Included origins:
- Bard
  - You deal more damage on low health
  - You gain regeneration when a nearby note block is played
  - You can duplicate allays without a jukebox playing
  - You gain regeneration by right clicking with an amethyst shard
  - Creepers you kill have a 25% chance of dropping music discs even if not killed by a skeleton
- Centaur
  - You always on a horse
  - You jump higher than regular horses
  - You are faster than regular horses
  - You are stronger on nights with a full moon
  - You have perfect aim with a bow
- Dragonborn
  - You can right click with a glass bottle to store your dragon's breath in it
  - You have more health and are stronger in the end
  - You are healed by end crystals
  - You can shoot a dragon fireball by right clicking with a sword
  - You take less damage from arrows
- Dwarf
  - You have infinite haste
  - You have infinite night vision
  - Ores you break drop more minerals
  - You have immunity to poison and harming potion effects
  - You are only one block tall
- Elf
  - You have perfect aim with a bow
  - Arrows you shoot deal more damage than ones shot by humans
  - Arrows you shoot are faster than ones shot by humans
  - Potion effects on your arrows are stronger
  - By left clicking with your bow, you shoot 3 arrows for the cost of 1, though this disables your bow for 7 seconds
- Giant
  - You have double the health of a human
  - You deal more melee damage but have a longer cooldown on your attacks
  - You're a poor shot with your arrows
  - You have natural armor
  - You are 3 blocks tall
- Gargoyle
  - Your skin is made of dull gray stone (requires the SkinsRestorer hook to be set up in the Origins-Reborn `config.yml`)
  - You are immune to knockback
  - You walk slower than others
  - You are immune to fire
  - You are immune to status effects
  - You deal more melee damage but have a longer cooldown on your attacks
  - You have natural armor points
- Naiad
  - You have extra health and deal more damage in water or rain
  - You're weaker and slower when not in the water
  - You can breathe underwater but not on land
  - You can see clearly underwater
  - You can break blocks underwater at the same speed as on land
  - You swim faster in water than a human
  - You only sink in water when you want to
- Vampire
  - You can transform other players into vampires by killing them
  - You burn in daylight
  - You take damage in water
  - You heal a small amount of health upon killing something
  - You deal more damage than humans
  - Undead mobs don't attack you unprovoked
- Human
  - This overrides the basic human origin with a custom description, you can remove this in the `~/plugins/Origins-Fantasy/origins/` if you want to use the default description.
